UnicornWay._comment: Access to Unicorn Way guarantees the Level 5 requirement for doing certain quests in Olde Town and Golem Court early and using Majid teleport. Do the Combat Tutorial for extra XP.

EarlyOldeTown.requires: |Area-Olde Town| and (|Teleport-Friendly| or (|Area-Shopping District| and (|Teleport-Majid| or {wizReach(PostUW)}))) and {hasLevel(5)}
EarlyOldeTown._comment: Friendly teleport to the Bazaar or teleport to Majid to access early. These quests become available at Level 5.

ShoppingDistrict._comment: Majid TP available at level 5 via UW quests. No assumed direct friendly TP to shopping district: instead go to Bazaar.

GolemCourt._comment: Friendly Teleport to Kane ShadowBane in The Drains to access this area before finishing Unicorn Way.

GolemCourt-GolemTower._comment: Quests for Golem Tower fights require Level 5

EarlyStreets._comment: Friendly teleport for early access OR main access through Muldoon region.

EarlyStreets-Triton._comment: Friendly teleport to a random player to access early. Can be reached directly from Olde Town after Muldoon by walking through the closed gate.

EarlyStreets-HauntedCave._comment: Friendly teleporting directly to the Haunted Cave is not possible, so it is only accessible through the Triton area.

EarlyStreets-Firecat._comment: Friendly teleport to a random player to access early. Can be reached directly from Olde Town after Muldoon by walking through the closed gate.

EarlyStreets-Cyclops._comment: Friendly teleport to a random player to access early. Can be reached directly from Olde Town after Muldoon by walking through the closed gate.

Muldoon._comment: Gate to the Three Streets and other post-Muldoon content

Foulgaze._comment: Requires completing all three streets via events. Same as PostStreets without the module restriction, allowing Foulgaze victory with PostStreets module disabled.

PostOneStreet._comment: Side systems (city tour, fishing, photomancy) unlocked after completing one street
